subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-23 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: The stories of the prophets recorded in the Koran are not for the sake of recording history. They are as warnings to future generations after Mohammed
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @predictions and prophecies, @growth of the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
